SEARCH
Package com.dua3.utility.ui

Class RichTextPaneLayoutHelper

java.lang.Object
com.dua3.utility.ui.RichTextPaneLayoutHelper
public final class RichTextPaneLayoutHelper extends Object
A utility class for handling layouts related to rich text panes. Provides methods and data structures to prepare, calculate, and manage text layouts with advanced features such as inline elements, text wrapping, and attribute handling.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    RichTextPaneLayoutHelper.Layout<P>
    A record representing the layout of rendered text within a specific area, including metadata about the text's layout and appearance.
    static final record 
    RichTextPaneLayoutHelper.LayoutPreparation
    Encapsulates the data required for preparing the layout of rich text content.
    static final record 
    RichTextPaneLayoutHelper.LayoutTextData
    Represents structured mapping data between the layout and the source text within a rich text layout system.

  • Field Details

    • STYLE_INVISIBLE_TEXT

      public static final Style STYLE_INVISIBLE_TEXT
      A predefined Style that applies to text content to make it invisible. The style sets the text color to fully transparent black, effectively hiding it from view while maintaining its presence in the layout.

      This style is typically used for layout purposes where text needs to occupy space but remain unseen to the user.

  • Method Details

    • prepareLayout

      public static <I> RichTextPaneLayoutHelper.LayoutPreparation prepareLayout(RichText source, Font font, boolean wrapText, double availableWidth, String inlineLeadingWidthStyleAttribute, BiFunction<? super Run,? super Font,@Nullable I> inlineFactory, ToDoubleFunction<? super I> inlineWidthFunction)
      Prepares the layout for rendering rich text content based on the specified parameters. This method processes the source rich text, segments it into fragments for layout and rendering, and calculates the necessary dimensions.
      Type Parameters:
      I - The type of inline objects created for processing run elements.
      Parameters:
      source - The source RichText object that contains the text to be processed.
      font - The base Font used for rendering the text.
      wrapText - A boolean indicating whether the text should wrap at the available width.
      availableWidth - The available width within which the text layout is prepared.
      inlineLeadingWidthStyleAttribute - A style attribute representing the leading width for inline elements.
      inlineFactory - A BiFunction that creates inline objects from a Run element and the provided Font.
      inlineWidthFunction - A ToDoubleFunction that computes the width of the inline objects created by the inlineFactory.
      Returns:
      A LayoutPreparation object containing the processed layout text data, fragmented structures for layout and rendering, and the calculated rendering width.

    • hasInlineNode

      public static boolean hasInlineNode(Run run)
      Checks whether the given Run contains an inline node style attribute. This method iterates through the styles of the provided Run and determines if any of the styles include an inline node factory or an inline node entry.
      Parameters:
      run - the Run instance to check for inline node style attributes.
      Returns:
      true if the Run contains an inline node style attribute, otherwise false.
